stemHtml: Per ICAO Doc 8168, why might a Resolution Advisory (RA) follow a Traffic Advisory (TA)?

options.a: Because TAs show the approximate positions of intruding aircraft that may subsequently trigger RAs.
options.b: Because TAs suggest vertical manoeuvres intended to increase or maintain separation from threatening aircraft.
options.c: Because a threatening aircraft must first generate an RA before a TA can be issued.
options.d: Because TAs suggest horizontal manoeuvres intended to increase or maintain separation from threatening aircraft.
